# Recommended labels

Create these labels in GitHub:

- bug (#d73a4a)
- enhancement (#a2eeef)
- documentation (#0075ca)
- needs-triage (#ededed)
- needs-info (#fbca04)
- accepted (#0e8a16)
- closed-not-planned (#cfd3d7)
- duplicate (#cfd3d7)
- priority-p1 (#b60205)
- priority-p2 (#d93f0b)
- priority-p3 (#fbca04)
